creator: guimaxali@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I use lightdm for login in HardenedBSD, I installed the slick-greeter as greeter-session.

I didn't succeded configure it until I linked /var/lib/dbus/machine-id to /var/local/lib/dbus/machine-id.

In fact using dconf-editor via the terminal, i noticed that gtk was looking for /var/local/lib/dbus/machine-id and not /var/lib/dbus/machine-id (where dbus creates machine-id).

Tell me if you need some conf files or what, i'm not an expert of GTK.

Regards
